definition.en: A mental image then is also a pattern of internal sound with electromagnetic properties imbued with certain light values.
definition.zh: 一个心象也是由具有电磁属性的内在声音模式，并注入了特定的光值所构成。

definition.en: In a sense, and a very real one, the mental image is incipient matter; and any structure so composed, combining the electromagnetic sound and light values, will automatically try to reproduce itself in physical existence, or materialization.
definition.zh: 在某种意义上，而且是非常真实的意义上，心象是初期的物质；任何如此构成的结构，结合了电磁声音与光值，都会自动试图在物质实相中复制自身，或说物质化。

definition.en: Mental images, though they may occur within the physical skull, are not in themselves physical. The images, again, are only the symbols, the physical symbols, of inner knowledge. They are not the knowledge but the symbols of them.
definition.zh: 心象，尽管可能发生在物理的头颅之内，它们本身并非物质性的。这些心象，再说一次，只是内在知识的符号，物质性的符号。它们不是知识本身，而是知识的符号。

definition.en: Mental images therefore are extremely powerful, combining inner sound and its effects with a clear mental picture which will seek physical form.
definition.zh: 心象极为强大，它们将内在声音及其效应与一个清晰的心智画面相结合，而这个画面会寻求物质形态。

definition.en: The intensity of a feeling or thought or mental image is, therefore, the important element in determining its subsequent physical materialization.
definition.zh: 一个感受、思想或心象的强度，是决定其随后物质化的重要元素。

explanation:
想象是具备电磁属性和光值的内在声音模式，是尚未成形的物质雏形。它本质上是能量结构，会自动寻求在物质世界中复制自身。想象的核心强度决定了它转化为物理现实的速度——无论这个想象是恐惧的还是喜悦的，都会同等有效地被物质化。

每个想象都像一张蓝图，在强烈情绪驱动下，会作为中性的"结果"在现实中显现为对应的物体、状况或事件。想象本身不是知识，而是内在知识的物理符号。它们能同时探索多种可能性路径，将信息瞬间反馈给意识，帮助做出选择。

想象的力量在于它结合了内在声音与清晰的心理画面，而想象力则赋予其推进动力。因此，一个人的信念往往以内在视觉形式呈现，并伴随特定的心理图像。通过有意识地运用想象，

quotes.text: Now: When you create a mental image in your mind it is composed of the same properties just mentioned. A mental image then is also a pattern of internal sound with electromagnetic properties imbued with certain light values. In a sense, and a very real one, the mental image is incipient matter; and any structure so composed, combining the electromagnetic sound and light values, will automatically try to reproduce itself in physical existence, or materialization. (Long pause.) There is a definite connection, then, with the nature of such images and the way in which your body itself is composed.
quotes.translation: 当你在脑海中创造一个心象时，它由刚才提到的相同属性构成。因此，心象也是一种内在声音的模式，具有电磁属性并带有特定的光值。在某种意义上，且是非常真实的意义上，心象是初期的物质；任何如此构成的结构，结合了电磁声音和光值，都会自动尝试在物质存在或物质化中复制自身。（长停顿。）因此，这类心象的本质与你的身体本身构成的方式之间存在明确的联系。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Past associations merge with present reality and form a pattern. Mentally, a part of you actually starts out upon each street -- a projected mental image. Period. As you stand there, then, in this case two such projected images go out onto streets Three and Four. To some extent these images experience "what will happen" if you yourself take one direction or the other. That information is returned to you instantaneously, and you make your decision accordingly. Say you choose Street Four. Physically you begin to walk in that direction. Street Four becomes your physical reality. You accept that experience in your prime sequence of events. You have, however, already sent out an energized mental image of yourself into Street Three, and you cannot withdraw that energy.
quotes.translation: 过去的联想与当下的现实融合，形成一个模式。在心灵上，你的一部分实际上会进入每条街道——一个投射出的心象。当你站在那里时，在这种情况下，两个这样的投射心象会进入第三和第四街道。在某种程度上，这些心象会体验到如果你自己选择其中一个方向“将会发生什么”。这些信息会瞬间返回给你，你据此做出决定。假设你选择了第四街道。你开始在物质上朝那个方向行走。第四街道成为你的物质现实。你接受那个体验作为你主要事件序列的一部分。然而，你已经将自身的一个充满能量的心象发送到第三街道，并且你无法撤回那股能量。

quotes.text: If your turn of mind is highly intense and you think in vivid mental emotional images, these will be swiftly formed into physical events. If you are also of a highly pessimistic nature, given to thoughts and feelings of potential disaster, then these thoughts will be quite faithfully reproduced in experience.
quotes.translation: 如果你的思维倾向高度强烈，并且你以生动的心灵情感意象思考，这些意象会迅速形成物质事件。如果你同时具有高度悲观的天性，倾向于潜在灾难的想法和感受，那么这些想法会相当忠实地在体验中被复制。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each thought or emotion therefore exists as an electromagnetic energy unit or as a combination of these under certain conditions, and often with the help of coordinate points, they emerge into the building blocks of physical matter. This emergence into matter occurs as a neutral "result" regardless of the nature of any given thought or emotion. Mental images, accompanied by strong emotion, are blueprints therefore upon which a corresponding physical object, or condition or event, will in your terms appear.
quotes.translation: 每个思想或情感都作为电磁能量单元存在，或在特定条件下作为这些单元的组合存在，并且常常借助坐标点，它们涌现为物质物质的构建块。这种向物质的涌现作为一个中性的“结果”发生，无论任何给定思想或情感的性质如何。伴随强烈情感的心象，因此是蓝图，在此基础上，一个相应的物质对象、条件或事件，用你们的话来说，将会出现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are used to acting on knowledge only when it is so physically passed on, and the more numerous the forms in which it physically appears the greater your trust of it. Mental images, though they may occur within the physical skull, are not in themselves physical. The images, again, are only the symbols, the physical symbols, of inner knowledge. They are not the knowledge but the symbols of them.
quotes.translation: 你习惯于只在知识以物质方式传递时才对其采取行动，而它在物质上出现的形式越多，你对它的信任就越大。心象，尽管可能发生在物质头颅内，但它们本身并非物质。这些心象，再次强调，只是内在知识的符号，是物质符号。它们不是知识本身，而是知识的符号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We gave you mental images and upon these images you learned to form the world that you knew.
quotes.translation: 我们给予你们心灵意象，而你们正是基于这些意象，学会了构建你们所认知的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Mental images therefore are extremely powerful, combining inner sound and its effects with a clear mental picture which will seek physical form. Your imagination adds motivating and propelling power to such images, and so you will find that many of your beliefs are entertained by you in an inner visual manner. They will have mental pictures connected with them.
quotes.translation: 心灵意象具有极其强大的力量，它将内在声音及其效果与寻求物质形态的清晰心灵画面相结合。你的想象力为这些意象增添了激发与推动的力量，因此你会发现，许多信念都是以内在视觉的方式被你接纳的。这些信念会伴随着与之相关的心灵画面。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The intensity of a feeling or thought or mental image is, therefore, the important element in determining its subsequent physical materialization.
quotes.translation: 一种感受、思想或心灵意象的强度，是决定其随后物质化实现的关键要素。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the same way that an idea may appear within your system as a thought, a mental image, a dream picture or as a physical object, so does any action event appear in many forms.
quotes.translation: 一个想法可能以思想、心灵意象、梦境画面或物质实物的形式出现在你的系统中，任何行动事件也同样会以多种形态显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json
